backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the event planning platform backend with user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, and reviews. Includes authorization mixins, blob storage, and CRUD operations for all entities with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features related to restoring navigation menu items in the Header component and verifying conditional rendering logic for authenticated states.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, and hooks with details about authentication, routing, event management, organizer browsing, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FIESTA application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component using TanStack Router to define all routes (landing, guest, organizer, admin pages) with Layout wrapper including Header, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component displaying analytics metrics with icon, label, value, and optional description using shadcn/ui Card components.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin dashboard component displaying analytics cards for total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest rated organizer using data from backend queries.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with query cache clearing on logout, red destructive styling for logout state, and error handling for authentication edge cases.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting full name and email with form validation, error handling, and non-dismissible overlay to ensure profile completion.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: Modal dialog for guests to request bookings with organizers by selecting one of their events. Handles form submission, success/error states, and navigation to bookings page after successful request.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Displays a list of booking cards for guests, showing booking status, organizer details, and associated event information (date, location, guests, style, contact). Fetches event details for each booking.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Card component for organizers to view booking requests with approve/reject actions. Displays booking status, event details, and guest contact information with formatted dates and icons.
Organizes and displays organizer bookings in two sections: pending requests and past bookings. Renders OrganizerBookingCard components for each booking.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: Form for creating events with fields for event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number. Validates date is not in the past and converts to nanosecond timestamp for backend.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of event cards showing event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact information. Formats timestamps to readable dates.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying copyright information and attribution link to caffeine.ai with dynamic year and hostname-based UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header component with logo, authentication-aware menu links (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard), and responsive mobile menu toggle. Integrates LoginButton and uses Internet Identity for auth state.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Displays organizer profile as a card with contact info, experience, pricing, rating, availability badge, portfolio image previews, and action buttons (Book Now, View Details). Supports selection mode with checkbox and opens BookingRequestModal.
Renders a sortable table comparing multiple organizers by rating, experience, and pricing with action buttons to book each organizer. Opens BookingRequestModal when user clicks book button.

Form component for creating or editing organizer profiles with fields for company name, contact number, experience years, pricing range, description, and availability status. Uses useSaveOrganizerProfile mutation and displays toast notifications.
Read-only view of an organizer profile displaying company details, contact info, experience, pricing, reviews, availability badge, and embedded PortfolioGallery component.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: Grid gallery displaying organizer portfolio images with lightbox modal for full-size viewing and navigation controls. Fetches images via useGetOrganizerPortfolioImages hook and handles image loading from sessionStorage or static assets.
React component for organizers to upload, preview, and delete portfolio images with file validation (5MB max, JPG/PNG/WebP), progress tracking, and integration with backend mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance for backend communication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor with loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, and portfolio images with mutations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom navy/gold theme colors, light/dark mode support, and utility classes for shadows and brand colors.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that merges Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Protected admin-only page that displays analytics dashboard, redirecting non-admin users and unauthenticated visitors to home.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Protected page displaying authenticated guest's bookings list with redirect to home for unauthenticated users.
Protected page with two-column layout showing event creation form and list of guest's existing events, requiring authentication.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Guest page for browsing and selecting organizers with multi-select comparison, image lightbox with keyboard navigation, and routing to comparison view.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, feature cards (event planning, organizer discovery, comparison, tracking), and CTAs that route authenticated users to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Organizer-facing page displaying booking requests using OrganizerBookingList component with navigation back to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Comparison view page that filters organizers by IDs from URL search params and displays them in a side-by-side comparison table.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Organizer dashboard with profile creation/editing, profile view toggle, portfolio upload, and gallery management with navigation to booking requests.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component using class-variance-authority with variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon).
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Card component system with sub-components (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) for consistent layout structure.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter utilities for extracting query params from hash-based or browser routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including color palette (navy, gold, chart colors), typography, animations (accordion), shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request to restore navigation menu items (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard) that disappeared after Version 20, leaving only the logout button visible for authenticated users.
